Ingests files, profiles data and sets quality rules, authors and repairs pipelines, provisions clusters, and debugs via the Spark UI. Governs the platform (roles, credential store, Delta Sharing, audit logs), plus native Git, bundles, and MLOps/MLflow. Runs via the official Oracle aidp CLI.
